violations.text: An open employees' beverage container was observed stored in a food preparation area. Employees shall not drink from open beverage containers in order to prevent contamination of their hands, the container, and exposed food. Covers were placed on beverages. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025

Establishment is not documenting the amount disposed and time of disposal for sushi rice as required. Inspector instructed staff and PIC during inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
Eggrolls were observed stored in a reused box. Staff removed and placed in container. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
Utensils were observed stored in stagnant water between uses. A knife was observed stored between prep units. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/25/2025
